negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for neg.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for neg.tptp
1. winner(steinhauer) [input(axiom)]
7. winner(steinhauer) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~winner(steinhauer) [negated conjecture 7]
9. ~winner(steinhauer) [flattening 8]
17. winner(steinhauer) [cnf transformation 1]
19. ~winner(steinhauer) [cnf transformation 9]
20. $false [forward subsumption resolution 17,19]
% SZS output end Proof for neg.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
